name: Logo Strip
description: Horizontal display of logos or icons for partners, sponsors, integrations, or tech stack. Supports static flex row and scrolling marquee.

static.description: Flex row of logos with opacity hover effect.

slots.label: Optional section label above the logos
slots.logos: Horizontal row of logo images or icons

marquee.description: Continuously scrolling logo rows using Marquee component. Two rows with opposite directions.

slots.label: Optional section label above the marquee rows
Optional section label
slots.logos: Horizontal row of logo images or icons
